qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path traversal in webui file serving allows arbitrary file read
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes a path traversal vulnerability in the webui static file serving endpoint, which is unrelated to the advisory's EventStream authorization bypass issue. The advisory describes missing per-action authorization checks in the live event streaming callbacks (OnExecutionStarted, OnExecutionFinished, OnOutputChunk) at service/internal/api/api.go, while this finding involves path traversal in service/internal/httpservers/webuiServer.go:49.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The qualifying finding does not identify the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory describes an authorization bypass in the EventStream API where authenticated users receive action output without per-action ACL checks (service/internal/api/api.go:776, 846, 869, 1047). The finding 'path-traversal-webui-file-read' describes path traversal in the webui file server (service/internal/httpservers/webuiServer.go:49), which is unrelated to the EventStream authorization issue.
evidence: Advisory root cause: EventStream broadcasts execution events to all connected clients without checking per-action authorization (service/internal/api/api.go)
Finding 'path-traversal-webui-file-read': Path traversal in webui file serving (service/internal/httpservers/webuiServer.go:49) - unrelated to EventStream authorization issue
